title: MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - 211info
text: SEQUOIA MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health and addictions services for children and adults. Services include case management, individual/group and family counseling, skills training, and drug and alcohol treatment. 4585 SW 185th Avenue Aloha, OR 97078 Eligibility: Individuals with mental health or addiction needs who have Medicaid or who are very low-income Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-7pm and Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 619-1560 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 619-1560 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Free or low-cost, varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information and prior mental health information is helpful LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-7pm and Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near the intersection of 185th Avenue and Kinnaman, just north of Aloha High School Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Family Counseling Individual Counseling Life Skills Education Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH RESOURCE NETWORK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SEQUOIA MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES
